message:
test(doctor): strengthen policy activation e2e tests with decision_outcome assertions

- Add check_message() helper to extract diagnostic messages by doctor code
- Add binary discovery fallback for target/debug/frankenengine-node path
- Assert decision_outcome.chosen and decision_outcome.reason across all four
  test paths (pass, warn, block, invalid-input)
- Verify TopCandidateAccepted reason on pass/warn paths and
  AllCandidatesBlocked on block path
- Confirm error message content on invalid-input failure path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
